name: onboarding-waypoint
description: Validate fresh-player orientation, objective text, and world waypoint guidance.

args.code:
local HttpService=game:GetService("HttpService")
local command=game.ServerStorage:WaitForChild("PunchWallAutomation")
command:Invoke("Reset")
local p=game.Players:GetPlayers()[1]
local spawn=workspace:FindFirstChild("Punch Rookie Spawn",true)
p.Character:PivotTo(spawn.CFrame*CFrame.new(0,4,0))
return HttpService:JSONEncode({spawnYaw=math.floor(spawn.Orientation.Y+0.5),tutorial=command:Invoke("Snapshot").TutorialStep})

local HttpService=game:GetService("HttpService")
local gui=game.Players.LocalPlayer.PlayerGui:WaitForChild("PunchWallHUD")
local waypoint=gui:WaitForChild("TutorialWaypoint")
local help=gui:WaitForChild("ObjectiveCard")
local context=gui:WaitForChild("ContextTarget")
return HttpService:JSONEncode({enabled=waypoint.Enabled,target=waypoint.Adornee and waypoint.Adornee.Name or "",objective=help.Text,context=context.Text,contextVisible=context.Visible})
